chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Revision Application No.S-15 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of M.A. No.1418/2022. 21.03.2022. Mr. Shahnawaz Bughio, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Fayaz Hussain Sabki, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh. == IRSHAD ALI SHAH, J.- The applicant on conclusion of trial was convicted under section 411 P.P.C and sentenced to undergo R.I for three years with fine of Rs.45,000/- and in default whereof to undergo S.I. for thirty days with benefit of section 382-b Cr.P.C by learned Civil Judge & J.M-I/MTMC Dadu, vide judgment dated 30.08.2021, which was impugned by him by preferring an appeal, it was dismissed by learned 1st Additional Sessions Judge, Dadu, vide judgment dated 15.01.2022, which is impugned by him before this Court by preferring the instant criminal revision application, and in the meanwhile, has sought for suspension of sentence and his release on bail, mainly for the reasons that sentence awarded to him is short one and hearing of his revision application is likely to take time. Learned Assistant Prosecutor General for the State has recorded no objection to release of the applicant on bail pending disposal of his revision application. In view of above, while relying upon case of Abdul Hameed Vs. Muhammad Abdullah and others (1999 SCMR-2589), the sentence awarded to the applicant is suspended, consequently, he is admitted to bail subject to his furnishing surety in sum of Rs.30,000/- and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court.

In view of above, while relying upon case of Abdul Hameed Vs. Muhammad Abdullah and others (1999 SCMR-2589), the sentence awarded to the applicant is suspended, consequently, he is admitted to bail subject to his furnishing surety in sum of Rs.30,000/- and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. Listed application (M.A.No.1418/2022) is disposed of accordingly. Adjourned to date in office for hearing of revision application. JUDGE
